title: Figure 1 in A quantitative method for collecting water mites in lotic, riffle-run habitats for water quality biomonitoring
author: Stenger, Logan R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 Examples of impaired and attaining riffle-run stream habitats in central Pennsylvania. a – Warriors Mark Run, impaired stream; b – Muddy Run, impaired stream; c – Spruce Run, attaining stream; d – Laurel Run, attaining stream.
